subcodes.first_line: O trusted one of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Thy letter dated 10 Jamádíyu'l-Avval 1339 hath arrived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء نامه شما که بتاریخ ۱۰ جمادی الاولی ۱۳۳۹ بود رسید از خطایا و
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
